profile.name: Newaz Nezif
profile.bio: Specializing in graphic design, investigative reporting, and visual storytelling. I bridge the gap between complex data and compelling human narratives through editorial design and rigorous research.

experience.description: Redesigned internal reporting frameworks and customer-facing visual communications.
Produced long-form investigative reports with integrated data visualizations.

projects.title: Computer Networking Book Coverpage
projects.description: A professional architectural book cover designed for 'Computer Networking: From Zero to Hero'. The design focuses on bold, red-and-black typography to establish authority, while a clean, structural layout ensures clarity for educational materials and online seminars.
projects.outcome: Created a high-impact visual identity for a networking education series, improving brand recognition across digital and print mediums.

projects.title: Educational Promotional Content
projects.description: A high-conversion social media promotional graphic designed for 'EU Online School'. The layout features a 50% discount badge and a comprehensive list of academic services (Thesis, Research, Proposals), using playful illustrations and a structured grid to engage students and researchers across digital platforms.
projects.outcome: Developed a visually striking promotional campaign that increased lead generation for academic support services.

projects.title: Company Logo
projects.description: A modern, dynamic visual identity designed for 'Borcelle Company'. The logo features a stylized, sweeping circular emblem in corporate blue and energetic orange, symbolizing motion, connectivity, and forward-thinking growth. The clean sans-serif typography ensures strong brand presence across all corporate applications.
projects.outcome: Developed a versatile brand mark that unified the company's digital and print communication channels.

projects.title: Shield Security
projects.description: A minimalist, high-impact brand identity for 'Shield Security'. The logo employs a geometric shield emblem composed of clean, intersecting lines in a bold crimson hue, representing structural integrity and modern defense. This case study explores the visual evolution of the mark and its application across security-focused digital interfaces.
projects.outcome: Designed a robust visual system that conveys trust and safety, tailored for the modern cybersecurity sector.

projects.title: Educational Promotional Content
projects.description: A comprehensive promotional flyer for the 'Cyber Security & Hacking Course' by ZareCyber Guard. This design utilizes a high-density information layout to showcase course modules—including networking basics, social engineering, and cloud security—while using cyber-themed iconography and a 50% discount call-to-action to drive student enrollment.
projects.outcome: Developed an information-rich promotional asset that successfully communicated complex course details in a visually engaging format.

projects.title: Youth Logo
projects.description: A minimalist and symbolic logo designed for a youth-focused initiative. The mark features a nautical anchor combined with a golden sunburst/crown element, representing stability, hope, and the rising potential of the next generation. The design uses traditional Ge'ez typography to ground the brand in its cultural heritage while maintaining a modern, clean aesthetic.
projects.outcome: Created a timeless cultural emblem that resonates with youth while honoring traditional roots.

projects.title: Event Posts
projects.description: A vibrant social media campaign designed for 'International Wellness Day' by the Melhiq team. The design uses a soft, empowering palette of pinks and deep blues, featuring clean line-art illustrations and minimalist typography to promote mental health awareness and community engagement across Instagram and Facebook.
projects.outcome: Crafted a cohesive visual story that drove record engagement for a global awareness initiative.

projects.title: Advertisment Post
projects.description: An official launch advertisement for the 'YAC' initiative by Melhiq Communication Team. The design uses high-energy orange accents and bold, declarative typography ('Official Launch', 'Youth Voices. Real Impact.') to announce the project's commencement. Featuring custom illustrations of youth activists, the post is engineered for social mobilization and brand awareness.
projects.outcome: Created a bold, mobilization-focused campaign that successfully launched a major youth initiative.

projects.title: Early Gasha
projects.description: A powerful heraldic logo designed for 'Early Gasha', a startup specialized in Humanitarian AI Risk Prediction. The mark combines a traditional shield and eagle (symbolizing vigilance and protection) with a central CPU/circuit element, representing the integration of cutting-edge artificial intelligence in mitigating global humanitarian risks. The monochromatic palette emphasizes authority, intelligence, and unwavering security.
projects.outcome: Established a strong, authoritative brand identity for a high-tech humanitarian startup, bridging the gap between tradition and innovation.

writing.title: The Silent Revolution: Urban Green Spaces
writing.excerpt: How neglected lots in industrial zones are becoming the backbone of city climate resilience. An in-depth analysis of municipal data and community impact.

writing.title: Design Systems in the Newsroom
writing.excerpt: Exploring why modern reporting requires a visual language as rigorous as the journalism itself. A look into the future of editorial tools.
